meta.title: A Method for Assessing the Size of a Protein from its Composition: a Correction

abstractHtml: A previous report in this Journal of a computer method for assessing the size of a protein from its amino acid composition, and its application to virus protein data, contained an error in the published arithmetical formula. Persons using the incorrect formula would not have obtained incorrect estimates of possible protein sizes, but would have obtained a more equivocal set of possible sizes.
